notes: ~10-15% of high-grade OS co-amplifies MDM2+CDK4 (12q); DDLPS carries the same amplicon. Site is the canonical tiebreaker — bone-site means OS not LPS. Pair only activates when MDM2>=100 or CDK4>=50 (amplified-signal present); low MDM2/CDK4 means no 12q-amp ambiguity to resolve.

EWS-FLI1 ectopically activates FATE1/NR0B1 via GGAA microsatellites (both near-silent in non-EWS tumors). DSRCT expresses WT1 C-terminal portion from EWSR1-WT1. ARMS requires myogenic MYOD1/MYOG from PAX3-FOXO1. Pair only activates when CD99 is elevated (>=20 TPM) — without the shared small-blue-round-cell signature there's no ambiguity.

NE markers CHGA/SYP/ENO2 shared across all well- and poorly-differentiated NETs; anatomic origin distinguishes pancreatic vs midgut vs lung carcinoid vs LCNEC. Pair only activates when at least one NE marker is meaningfully expressed; absent NE signal means the sample is not in the NET axis and no ambiguity applies.

All three carry KRT5/6 + TP63 + SOX2 squamous signature; site distinguishes tissue of origin. HPV-p16 status would further separate HNSC/CESC from LUSC but currently not in bulk-RNA pipeline. Pair only activates when the squamous marker panel is present.

CCND1 translocation drives MCL and is almost pathognomonic at the expression level. BCL6/LMO2 signal germinal-center origin (FL). CLL lacks both but carries CD5+ mature-B signature. Pair only activates when the sample carries B-cell markers.

NUT carcinoma is genetically defined by NUTM1 rearrangement. NUTM1 mRNA is near-silent in normal tissues AND in non-NUT tumors (median <0.5 TPM across all TCGA cohorts including LUSC/HNSC/CESC); expression >=1 TPM in a squamous-ish sample is the ONLY reliable surrogate. PRAME and MAGE-A panels are NOT NUTM-specific — they are broadly expressed in LUSC (PRAME median 24.5 TPM, MAGEA3 median 42 TPM) and using them as disambiguators would systematically mis-call LUSC as NUT carcinoma. Pair only activates when NUTM1 is detectably expressed; otherwise the classifier's squamous pick stands without modification.

Classifier already uses provisional COAD/READ label when site is ambiguous. Listed here for completeness — the mechanism is the canonical example of site-driven subtype resolution. No activation signature because COAD/READ is always a valid pairing once cancer type is colorectal.
